# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    S = list(data[1])
    Q = int(data[2])
    
    # Track the case transformation state
    # 0: no transformation, 1: all lowercase, 2: all uppercase
    case_transform = 0
    
    # Index for data
    idx = 3
    
    for _ in range(Q):
        t = int(data[idx])
        x = int(data[idx + 1])
        c = data[idx + 2]
        idx += 3
        
        if t == 1:
            # Change the x-th character (1-based index)
            pos = x - 1
            S[pos] = c
        elif t == 2:
            # Convert all uppercase to lowercase
            case_transform = 1
        elif t == 3:
            # Convert all lowercase to uppercase
            case_transform = 2
    
    # Apply the final case transformation
    if case_transform == 1:
        S = [ch.lower() for ch in S]
    elif case_transform == 2:
        S = [ch.upper() for ch in S]
    
    print(''.join(S))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
